_note: director and evaluator use strong models for planning/judgment. executor and reviewer use cost-efficient models for implementation/review.

cross-provider (recommended)._description: GPT plans, Claude executes. Best quality/cost ratio.

codex-only (GPT budget)._description: All GPT. Director/evaluator use 5.4, executor/reviewer use 5.4-mini.

mini (budget)._description: All gpt-5.4-mini. Low cost, decent quality.

spark (ultra-fast)._description: All gpt-5.3-codex-spark. Near-instant coding, lowest latency. Pro subscription required.

claude-only._description: All Claude. Director/evaluator use Opus, executor/reviewer use Sonnet.

balanced cross-provider._description: Like cross-provider but with reviewer enabled.

full strict._description: Maximum quality. GPT 5.4 for all roles, full pipeline with fix loops.
